icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><polygon points='12,3 21,12 12,21 3,12'/><path d='M12 7v4l-3 2'/></svg>
name: 流程图
template:
```mermaid
graph TD
    A[开始] --> B{条件}
    B -->|是| C[操作1]
    B -->|否| D[操作2]
    C --> E[结束]
    D --> E
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><line x1='6' y1='4' x2='6' y2='20'/><line x1='18' y1='4' x2='18' y2='20'/><path d='M6 10l4 2-4 2'/><path d='M18 14l-4-2 4-2'/></svg>
name: 时序图
template:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    用户->>系统: 请求
    系统->>数据库: 查询
    数据库-->>系统: 返回
    系统-->>用户: 响应
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='9'/><path d='M12 3a9 9 0 0 1 9 9h-9z'/></svg>
name: 饼图
template:
```mermaid
pie title 占比
    "分类A" : 40
    "分类B" : 30
    "分类C" : 20
    "分类D" : 10
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='3' width='18' height='18' rx='2'/><line x1='3' y1='9' x2='21' y2='9'/><line x1='3' y1='16' x2='21' y2='16'/></svg>
name: 类图

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='8'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='3'/><path d='M20 12l3 2-3 2'/></svg>
name: 状态图
template:
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> 待审核
    待审核 --> 通过
    待审核 --> 拒绝
    通过 --> 处理中
    处理中 --> 完成
    完成 --> [*]
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='4' width='16' height='4' rx='2'/><rect x='3' y='10' width='10' height='4' rx='2'/><rect x='3' y='16' width='18' height='4' rx='2'/></svg>
name: 甘特图
template:
```mermaid
gantt
    title 项目计划
    dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
    section 阶段A
    任务1 :a1, 2024-01-01, 30d
    任务2 :after a1, 20d
    section 阶段B
    任务3 :2024-02-01, 12d
    任务4 :24d
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='3'/><line x1='9' y1='9' x2='4' y2='4'/><line x1='15' y1='9' x2='20' y2='4'/><line x1='9' y1='15' x2='4' y2='20'/><line x1='15' y1='15' x2='20' y2='20'/></svg>
name: 思维导图
template:
```mermaid
mindmap
  root((中心主题))
    分支1
      子项A
      子项B
    分支2
      子项C
      子项D
    分支3
      子项E
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M12 2a8 8 0 0 0-8 8c0 5 8 12 8 12s8-7 8-12a8 8 0 0 0-8-8z'/><circle cx='12' cy='10' r='3'/></svg>
name: 旅程图
template:
```mermaid
journey
    title 用户旅程
    section 注册流程
      填写信息: 3: 用户
      验证邮箱: 2: 用户
      完成注册: 4: 用户
    section 使用产品
      浏览功能: 4: 用户
      提交反馈: 3: 用户
```

name: 桑基图
template:
```mermaid
sankey-beta
    Sources,中间节点,流量A
    中间节点,目标,流量B
    来源2,中间节点,流量C
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><line x1='3' y1='12' x2='21' y2='12'/><circle cx='6' cy='12' r='2.5'/><circle cx='12' cy='12' r='2.5'/><circle cx='18' cy='12' r='2.5'/></svg>
name: 时间线
template:
```mermaid
timeline
    title 项目里程碑
    2024 Q1 : 需求分析
    2024 Q2 : 开发阶段
    2024 Q3 : 测试阶段
    2024 Q4 : 上线发布
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='6' cy='6' r='2.5'/><circle cx='6' cy='18' r='2.5'/><circle cx='18' cy='12' r='2.5'/><line x1='6' y1='8.5' x2='6' y2='15.5'/><line x1='6' y1='8' x2='18' y2='12'/><line x1='18' y1='12' x2='6' y2='18'/></svg>
name: Git 图
desc: 展示 Git 分支合并历史
template:
```mermaid
gitGraph
    commit id: "初始化"
    branch feature
    commit id: "新增功能"
    checkout main
    commit id: "修复bug"
    merge feature
    commit id: "发布v1.0"
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><path d='M3 3v18h18'/><polyline points='6 16 10 11 14 13 18 8'/><rect x='6' y='14' width='3' height='6'/><rect x='15' y='8' width='3' height='12'/></svg>
name: XY 图
template:
```mermaid
xychart-beta
    title "月度数据"
    x-axis "月份" [1月, 2月, 3月, 4月]
    y-axis "数值" 0 --> 100
    bar [20, 45, 60, 80]
    line [15, 40, 55, 75]
```

icon: <svg viewBox='0 0 24 24' width='24' height='24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='3' width='18' height='5' rx='1'/><rect x='6' y='11' width='12' height='4' rx='1'/><rect x='9' y='18' width='6' height='3' rx='1'/><line x1='12' y1='8' x2='12' y2='11'/><line x1='12' y1='15' x2='12' y2='18'/></svg>
name: C4 图
template:
```mermaid
C4Context
    title 系统上下文图
    Person(用户, "用户")
    System(系统, "我们的系统")
    Rel(用户, 系统, "使用")
    System_Ext(外部, "外部服务")
    Rel(系统, 外部, "调用")
```
